subject: [Avatar 8 Complete] Buffett on American Capitalism & Political Economy — buffett-capitalism-politics
message:
Avatar 8 of 8 reporting: Buffett on American capitalism, democracy, taxes, wealth inequality, and political economy — **COMPLETE**.

## What Was Produced

**Skill:** `.library/custom/buffett-capitalism-politics/SKILL.md`
- **300 lines, 12 sections**
- Covers the complete political economy framework

## Section Breakdown

| # | Section | Key Content |
|---|---------|-------------|
| 1 | The Core Framework: System vs. Rules | Two-level distinction — capitalism excellent, current rules rigged |
| 2 | The Tax Inequality Argument | Buffett Paradox (17.4%), Buffett Rule (30% on $1M+) |
| 3 | "Stop Coddling the Rich" Framework | 2012 NYT op-ed, the self-inclusion rhetorical device |
| 4 | Class Warfare Statement | "My class is winning the class war" |
| 5 | Democracy & Political Influence | Citizens United, money in politics, bipartisan self-image |
| 6 | Government, Spending, Infrastructure | Auto bailout support, pro-investment with conditions |
| 7 | Estate Tax: "The Right Tax" | Pro-estate tax, Giving Pledge, $10M per child |
| 8 | Workers, Wages, Minimum Wage | "Employee as customer" argument |
| 9 | The Giving Pledge (2010) | 200+ billionaires, ~$50B donated |
| 10 | The American Dream | System praise without naivety |
| 11 | Key Sources | NYT, Annual Letters, Congressional Testimony, Forbes 400 |
| 12 | How to Discuss (Impersonation Guide) | Voice patterns, tone calibration, trigger phrases, what to avoid |
